data.body: Implemented + pushed as Gerrit change 454 (stacked). README front-door restructure: 4 badges, tagline (event-sourced/git-backed + agent-oriented + CLI/library/MCP) within first 15 lines, demo asset by ~line 10, 6 highlight bullets (tri-surface + two-gate Gerrit dogfooding), Install (pipx+brew), tight Quickstart (7 code lines: CLI+Python+MCP), 193 words before first fence (<200), 'How it works' absorbs the relocated prose, contributor pointer links your-first-change.md + CONTRIBUTING.md. ASSET-FORM DECISION: static terminal SVG (docs/assets/rebar-demo.svg) chosen over gif/asciinema/PNG — renders on GitHub zero-dep, versionable as text (diff-reviewable), no motion-accessibility concerns. All ACs grep/count-verified; lint green. Awaiting Verified+1.
